summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Supplier CRUD functionality and PO quick-create supplier feature. All features working correctly.

issues: React hydration warnings about <tr>/<span> in table structure - caused by conditional rendering inside <tbody>. Non-blocking but should be fixed for code quality.
Missing Description or aria-describedby for accessibility - should add for WCAG compliance

passed_tests: - POST /suppliers - Creates new supplier with all fields
- Supplier appears in search for PO creation
- Quick create supplier with minimal fields (just name)
- Suppliers page loads at /suppliers with data-testid='suppliers-page'
- New Supplier dialog opens with all fields: name (required), contact person, phone, email, address, notes
- Can successfully create a new supplier from Suppliers page
- Clicking supplier with details shows Edit button
- Supplier details panel shows: name, contact person, phone, email, address
- Stats cards visible: Total POs, Total Purchased, Total Paid, Pending Payment
- Dropdown appears when typing in vendor field
- Existing suppliers matching search appear in dropdown
- 'Create "X" as new supplier' option appears for non-existent names
- Clicking quick-create creates supplier and selects it
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: PurchaseOrderPage.js has React hydration warnings due to conditional rendering inside <tbody>. Consider using a Fragment or wrapping the map in a proper table row pattern.
Minor: DialogContent components missing aria-describedby for accessibility.
seed_data_creation: Created test suppliers with TEST_ and UI_Test_ prefixes during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supplier CRUD and quick-create features fully tested and working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_supplier_crud.py. Test credentials: admin/admin123.
